caption: A person with blonde hair wearing a black t-shirt appears in a small inset video window on the left side of a screen displaying a sports video game menu. The menu is titled "LINEUP" and features tabs for "OFFENSE," "DEFENSE," "SPECIAL TEAMS," "SPECIALISTS," "STRATEGY," and "VISUALS." The screen shows various digital player cards with numerical ratings and names, such as "TAYLOR" and "LAVONNE." At the top right, numerical values like "159,529," "14,600," and "1,787,369" are displayed alongside the number "21." At the bottom of the menu, text options include "BEST LINEUP," "HELP," and "BACK." Throughout the sequence, the layout of the game menu remains static, while the person in the inset video shifts their expression and slightly moves their head, appearing to speak or react. In the background of the inset video, a decorated Christmas tree is partially visible.
